name: Gulley, Gladys
motto: "All precious jewels are wrapped in small packages."

name: Daily, Walter
motto: "In 'Doc' you will find wisdom, courage, and an illimitable capacity for faith in his fellow-men. He is one of our most stately ancient philosophers."

name: Pearce, Ruth
motto: "Says he: 'Your eyes present me with a double doubting; for viewing both alike hardly my mind supposes whether the roses be your lips, or your lips the roses.'"

name: Hughes, Claud
motto: "Chemistry is his specialty; keeping watch at night his occupation—a substantial tribesman who is master and commander of all he undertakes."

name: Kemp, Lillian
motto: "Then be not coy, but use your time; and while you may go marry; For having but once your prime, you may forever tarry."

name: Ross, Clay
description: In school during the week, intermingled with frequent visits to town, is his idea of how the world should go round and round.

name: Dodson, Tom
description: Nature blended a musical talent, a love for the ladies, and a ceaseless flow of argument with the professors, and made Tom.

name: Arnold, Hazel
description: Wears her learning like a watch in a private pocket; does not pull it out to show that she has it.

name: Dickinson, Nona Horatio
motto: "Gather ye rose buds while ye may; Old Time is still a-flying."

name: Booth, Roy Village
description: He is long enough that his legs will reach from his body to the ground with perfect ease. An Ace in philosophy, wit, and humor.

name: Shull, Ida Horatio
motto: "There are many joys that come from Friendship, Love, and Liberty."

name: Crawford, Harvey Gilmer
description: Our representative of the Lone Star State. The wonderful Arkansas scenery has blurred his vision.

name: Collins, D. S.
motto: "Again Nature hath gone astray; and produced a strange creature in her day."

name: Brown, Minnie Lou
motto: "Yea, verily, she rideth to school in a Ford, and her attendance is regular."

name: Purifoy, Vada Bell
motto: "All women who are the most conspicuous to the eye are not the greatest in stature."

name: Justice, Frances
motto: "Every man loves justice at another man's expense."

name: Gladys, Tullis
motto: "Let your hook be always cast; where you least dream, there will be fish in the stream."

name: Claud, Wallis
description: Music, air rifles, cross-word puzzles, and his inexhaustible volume of philosophical fact has made him a great man in a small wardrobe.

name: Betty, Garrett
description: Well versed is she in the ways of the world; no man can lead her asunder.

name: Charles, Spicer
description: Radioing is his recreation. No doubt he will live 'till he dies.

name: Willie, Fontaine
description: What martial music is to marching men, should song be to humanity.

name: Measeles, Lucille
clubs: Secretary, Ka Me Ka Thee Society, third term, '23-'24
Assistant Home Economics Editor of Mule Rider, '24

name: Quarles, Lillian
clubs: Secretary Ka Me Ka Thee Society, second term, '23-'24

name: Wallace, Carl
clubs: Tiger of T. T. T. T., '24

name: Price, Ona
clubs: Editor of Home Economics Department of Mule Rider, '25
Treasurer Ka Me Ka Thee Society, third term, '24-'25

name: Monnie, Kent Patmos
description: Monnie has earnestly milked her way through school, but has endured it partly in hopes of a letter.

name: Oliver, Hickman
clubs: President Ka Me Ka Thee Society first term, '24-'25
Terrible Torturer T. T. T. T. T., '23-'24

name: Evie, Stone Gurdon
clubs: Secretary Ka Me Ka Thee Society first term, '24-'25
Ass't. Home Economics Editor Mule Rider, '25

name: Chester, Ledbetter Malvern
clubs: Vice-President Ka Me Ka Thee Society, second term, '24-'25

name: Edwin, Keith Stamps
clubs: President Ka Me Ka Thee Society, '24-'25
Ass't. Society and Organization Editor Mule Rider, '25
description: To be an athlete and musician has always been his ambition.

name: Davis, Mae
description: A very studious girl is Mae, Who has a good lesson every day. When looking over the "A" list, You see that it she has never missed.

name: Taylor, Raymond
clubs: Assistant Athletic Editor of Mule Rider, '24-'25

name: Hewitt, Frances Marian
clubs: Critic Ka Me Ka Thee Society first term, '23-'24
Secretary Ka Me Ka Thee Society second term, '24-'25
Favorite of Ka Me Ka Thee Society, '25

name: Meeks, Eudora
clubs: Society and Organization Editor Mule Rider, '25

name: Christine, Hendrix
clubs: Musician, Ka Me Ka Thee Society, three terms
Critic, Ka Me Ka Thee Society, first term, '24-'25

name: Charles, Bennett
clubs: Sergeant-at-arms, Ka Me Ka Thee Society, second term, '24-'25

name: Percy, Wilson
motto: "A man is a fool who don't like powder and a mirror."
description: A lover of good literature.

name: Edwin, Wheeler
description: "Kid" is always in the midst of things.

name: Luther, Weaver Rosston
description: A hard working fellow, That is hard to understand; At driving a Ford, He's the best in this land.

name: Dorothy, Stophs
description: never fails to do her day's work, And from her duty she will never shirk, Studying, to her, is a pleasure, Always trying to fill her teacher's measure.

name: Ruth, Sewell El Dorado
description: Many friends has quiet Ruth; Never known to vary from the truth; Never known out of her place; Never known to check the "Seniors'" pace.

name: William, Craig Milner
description: is wise and full o' fun, When you point he surely will run. He cannot stand to even linger, Whenever he sees a pointed finger.

name: Eudora, Ford Lewisville
description: "Baby Lincoln" joined our class this year. She is noted for her good looks, and a heart breaking smile.

name: Hudson, Janie Lou
description: When you want a friend that is tried, and from her never to part, just become acquainted with Janie Lou, and win her kind and loving heart.

name: Burrus, Opal
description: Opal is a member of our class from the Lone Star State; and on "exam" she can always pass, because she studies early and late.

name: Turrentine, Glenn
motto: "Early to bed and late to rise" is the advice he gives to the wise.
clubs: President Ka Me Ka Thee Society third term, '23-'24
Critic Ka Me Ka Thee Society second term, '24-'25
Sergeant-at-arms Ka Me Ka Thee Society third term, '24-'25

name: Sewell, Ralph
description: "Sewell" is determined to be a teacher, but his mind is fixed on a "Tree-top".

name: Lloyd, Esther
clubs: Cabinet member of Y. W. A., '24-'25
description: Tommy is considered quiet and demure by those who do not know her.

name: Silvey, Deward
description: Deward entered school late and has no photograph, but we believe it to be fixed in the mind of a "Craig".

name: Winnie Lee Hunt
description: One of the best workers in school; "Work before play" is her golden rule.

name: Holland Pearce
description: Charming in manner, appearance and speech.

name: Lois Hewitt
description: Of books and basketball, Hewitt doth partake; but above all, she loves her Lake.

name: Minnie Brown
description: We just wonder if all the people from Curtis are as courteous as Minnie is.

name: Lola Eakin
description: She is true to friends and all around her. You will like her better the more you are around her.

name: Shelby Haynes
description: In basketball Shelby can't be led. For he learned how to play before leaving Horsehead.

name: Denson Dodd
description: Denson is a military man; He goes to see Ruth every time he can.

name: Euel Eakin
motto: "Duty before pleasure"
description: is his motto.

name: Madison Gordon
description: Madison is swift in speed; And when it comes to making A's, he will always lead.

name: Lake Green
description: Lake is a boy who is swiftly winning fame; Of students like him, we are never ashamed.

name: Laurine, Thomas
description: Little but loud in her studies.

name: Robert, Allen
description: A mind at peace with all he can pick, For his heart is in his Arithmetic.

name: Niven, Morgan
description: It matters not what the world may bring— so long as there are women.

name: Winnie George, Pedigo
description: "Peggie" has a beautiful voice; Singing, "not flirting," is her choice.

name: Sue, Keys
motto: "There are many locks on Aggie Hill, but here is a key that will fit them all," says Bob.

name: Joy, Parsley
description: Joy is quiet with a brilliant mind; As a credit to school, she is a find.

name: Edward, Watson
description: Ed is a lady's man that will always win; If he is not singing a vocal solo, he is talking to a twin.

name: Dearl, Morrison
description: Dearl is not fast, but good and rally; He is not lost when he is with Hallye.

name: Opal, Norwood
description: Opal is like the dove; Very shrewd and easy to love.

name: Bob, McClure
description: Bob is tall, handsome and neat; when it comes to being a real sport, he can't be beat.

name: Martin, Starling
description: Flirting is his occupation and talking is his side line.

name: Bess, Harris
description: She is not like the rest; But certainly, she is going to be a success.

name: Howard, Hanna
description: Hanna comes from Texarkana to help us uphold the Aggie Banner.

name: Trebie, Davis
description: Trebie always has a beautiful grin; For she goes to see her Fred at every weekend.

name: Milton, Eason
description: True to her friends, although a freak to like.

name: Minnie Dell, Eason
description: This beautiful lady comes to us from Sparkman so she said; But whenever she leaves us, she is going to Horsehead.

name: Cecil, Myers
description: He feels within him a still and quiet conscience.

name: Curtis, Walker
description: Of all the English students, Curtis is the smartest; He can blow a trombone, and, too, is a great artist.

name: Daphne, Rowe
description: Spry and smart; her greatest ambition is to break some boy's heart.

name: Nell, Bond
description: Nell is similar to an electro-magnet; Very small, yet attractive.

name: Hudson, Artie Emerson
description: Artie has a thorough knowledge of the science of cooking; and he never steals sugar when anyone is looking.

name: Collins, Earl
description: A little wind kindleth a great fire, while a great one bloweth it out.

name: Stevens, Clara
description: She never talks except at all times.

name: Burns, Clovis
description: She never lets her studies interfere with her education.

name: Harris, Wilma
description: To every task she turns a helping hand; She is going to be a wife of some ambitious man.

name: Carter, Inez
description: Her specialty is art, the chief of which is stew-art.

name: Craig, Louisa
motto: "O woman, lovely woman! Nature made thee to temper man."

name: Middlebrooks, Gilbert
description: His physique is a ham bone perfect. To combine this with his disposition fits him for a circus.

name: Nowell, Lloyd
description: Lloyd is smart and may make a preacher; But we think he will be a Chemistry teacher.

name: Graham, Thomas
description: Our students are few in number that are equal to "Tommie's" parallel.

name: Jessie Mae, Starling Bradley
description: Wonder who's darling!

name: Murel, Rogers Patmos
description: True hearted, whole hearted, faithful and loyal.

name: Elmer, Taylor Caddo Gap
description: Where ignorance is bliss; 'Tis folly to be wise.

name: Gladys, Owen Emerson
description: is small and loud; Too smart and proud.

name: Robert, Musgrove Nashville
description: is a milk doodler from way back; but when he meets the ladies his wheel-barrow jumps the track.

name: Harless, Reece Daisy
description: Little bits of poetry; little bits of prose; Easily flow from "'Sister's'" pen, as Susie knows.

name: Mattie Faye, Mccollum Emerson
description: Heart on her lips and soul within her eyes; Soft as the clime, and sunny as the skies.

name: Ona, Tabler Ben Lomond
description: A girl with charm and willingness that wins her many friends.

name: Charles, Tucker Emerson
description: "Lesson in heart breaking," says "Bud," "My method never fails."

name: Myron, Pearce Magnolia
description: Pearce is here every day; At every class, it's an A.

name: Jo, Harrison
motto: "Earth's noblest thing, a woman perfected."

name: Frances, Holmes
motto: "To know her is a treat; At making A's she can't be beat."

name: Elisha, Mccollum
motto: "He who loves not women, wine and song, Will be wise his whole life long."

name: Louise, Brint
motto: "Sunshine steals light from her face."

name: Nita, Rowe
motto: "She has a good word for everyone."

name: Ruby, Williams
motto: "A heart more loyal never beat within a human breast."

name: Henry, Frasher
motto: "Small in size, but large in mind."

name: Hillary, Downs
motto: "Hillary is faithful and always ready to lend a helping hand."

name: Alice, Mize
motto: "She is very tall, yet a nice looking lass; Her grades rank among the highest of the class."

name: Homer, Burkett
motto: "Women are his specialty, chief objection of his personality."

name: Gerald, May
description: To the band and orchestra he is a blessing; but the height of his ambition is to make a cedar chest.

name: Frieda, Newberg
description: Frieda is large and funny; as a nurse, she is worth your money.

name: Wilma, Haney
description: She is best noted for her talking, as she never ceases.

name: Myrth, Parsley
description: Myrth is studious and not in vain; as a society worker, she has a good name.

name: Mabel, Hall
description: Mabel is a fine girl for I certainly know, but if you doubt my word, ask Theo.

name: Mattie, Waller
description: Mattie has won many friends that will never be her enemies.

name: Corbin, Owen
description: The U.S. has produced some great tall men, for example: George Washington, Abraham Lincoln, and myself.

name: Vera, Bruton
description: She talks little, bears much, and keeps unpleasant things to herself.

name: Fred, Brummet
description: The typical jelly bean.

name: Ray, Ware
description: A beautiful woman and a French harp in combination is hard to find.
